title: Near miss - haul truck and worker
description: Volvo A40G haul truck backing in embankment zone came within 8 feet of field engineer Luis Espinoza who was taking grade shots. Spotter was not in position. Operations halted for 45 minutes for site-wide safety standdown. All backing operations now require dedicated spotter. Ground disturbance permit reviewed.

title: Heat illness - laborer
description: Laborer Eduardo Reyes reported dizziness and nausea during afternoon shift during heat index of 104F. Transported to urgent care by company vehicle. Diagnosed with heat exhaustion. Returned to work day 3 with medical clearance. OSHA recordable - restricted duty first 2 days.

title: Equipment rollover - non-injury
description: CAT CB10 compactor operator initiated grade change on 4:1 slope in soft fill area. Machine began to slide. Operator activated ROPS and bailed. Machine rolled 90 degrees. No injury. Machine damage approximately $28000. Investigation found fill slope was steeper than design at this station. Grade corrected.

title: Struck by - sign post installation
description: Crew member struck on forearm by swinging sign post during installation. Minor bruise. First aid only. Sign installation SOP updated to require two-person operation with spotter.
